login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Public tools stay open. Sign in when you want to claim your organizer profile, request edits, or manage event state.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.subtitle: This deletes your Firebase Auth account. Your created content stays in the system and is marked as orphaned for admin follow-up.
deleteAccount.emailMismatch: The email does not match your signed-in account.
deleteAccount.genericError: We could not delete your account.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Welcome to ImprovIL. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy.
privacy.section1Content: We collect user registration details such as email, display names, and public links when you register a profile. Submission queue details, moderation records, and contact emails are stored inside our secure database hosted on Google Cloud's Firebase services.
privacy.section2Content: Your registration profile facilitates self-editing capabilities for organizers and events, allowing admins to associate event listings with registered users.
privacy.section3Content: All user data, listings, and moderation pipelines are secured using Firebase rules and authenticated API gates. We recommend using secure passwords and not sharing your credentials.
privacy.section4Content: We utilize Google Firebase Auth and Firestore DB to authenticate users and persist submissions records. Please refer to Google Cloud's Firebase Privacy Policy for details on their data processing mechanisms.
privacy.section5Content: You can request profile modifications, update outbound URLs, or delete your account completely at any time. Account deletion scrubs your private profile details and marks submission histories as orphaned.
privacy.section6Content: If you have questions or concerns regarding these terms, please contact us at support@soundguy.ai.
